summary: Testing of trade cooldown and grouping features completed. Backend: 30-second per-symbol cooldown working correctly (verified via API tests - recent trades are properly spaced >= 30s apart). Frontend: Trade grouping logic implemented correctly in TradeLogSidebar.tsx and HistoryTab.tsx - groups consecutive same-symbol/side trades with x{count} badges. However, due to the cooldown preventing rapid consecutive trades, the grouping feature has limited practical effect in current data. WebSocket connection intermittently fails in browser testing.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection fails intermittently with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' error. Sidebar shows 'No activity yet' when disconnected but eventually reconnects and shows grouped trades.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend cooldown implementation is correct and working (TRADE_COOLDOWN_SECS=30 at line 227)
Frontend grouping logic is correct - groups consecutive same-symbol/side trades
The 30s cooldown effectively prevents consecutive same-symbol trades, meaning grouping rarely activates with current data
WebSocket reconnection logic exists but connection seems unstable in production environment
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing trade data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade cooldown (30s per symbol) verified working. Grouping feature code is correct but rarely activates due to cooldown preventing consecutive same-symbol trades. WebSocket has intermittent connection issues but app falls back to HTTP polling. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_trading_cooldown.py with 10 passing tests.

backend_cooldown.implementation: TradingEngine.TRADE_COOLDOWN_SECS=30, _last_trade_ts dict, cooldown check in evaluate_ticker
backend_cooldown.verification: Recent trades show 30+ second gaps between same-symbol trades

sidebar_grouping.implementation: TradeLogSidebar.tsx - groupTrades() function, GroupRow component with expand/collapse
sidebar_grouping.verification: Saw 'B QBTS x10' and '4 trades / 1 groups' format in sidebar

history_tab_stats.verification: Shows Total Trades, Wins, Losses, Win Rate cards

history_tab_grouping.note: Code is correct but no consecutive same-symbol/side trades exist due to cooldown

watchlist_tab.verification: Ticker cards display correctly with Configure expand working
